# Magento User Guide — Adobe Commerce Expert Help

> Expert Magento and Adobe Commerce implementation, migration and optimisation. By Dahlquist E-handelskonsulter AB.

This site provides guidance on Magento 2, Adobe Commerce Cloud, and Open Source implementation for B2B and B2C merchants in Sweden and internationally.

## About

Dahlquist E-handelskonsulter AB was founded in 2016 by Niklas Dahlquist. We are Adobe Commerce and Magento specialists with experience from early Magento versions through current Adobe Commerce Cloud. 150+ completed projects.

## Key Topics

- Magento Open Source vs Adobe Commerce Cloud comparison
- Magento performance optimisation (Varnish, FPC, Elasticsearch)
- ERP integration (Business Central, SAP, Jeeves, Visma)
- Adobe Commerce B2B module (company accounts, shared catalogues, quotes, PunchOut)
- Hyva Theme implementation
- Magento version upgrades and migration

## Contact

For Magento and Adobe Commerce expertise: https://dahlquist.se/magento
